files.contents:
Flashcard App

Minimal red/black/white flashcards. Add, update, delete.

Cards

# Flashcard App

Minimal Express-based flashcard app with Tailwind CSS frontend.

- Framework: Express
- Port: 7995
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (red, black, white)

Scripts:
- npm start: Start server
- npm run dev: Start with nodemon
- npm test: Run tests

Run locally:
1. npm install
2. npm start
3. Open http://localhost:7995

API Endpoints:
- GET /api/cards -> List cards
- POST /api/cards -> Create card {front, back}
- PUT /api/cards/:id -> Update existing (front/back)
- DELETE /api/cards/:id -> Delete card

Persistence:
- Data stored in data/cards.json (override with env DATA_FILE)

notes: Data is persisted to data/cards.json by default. Tests override this using the DATA_FILE environment variable.
Run tests with npm test. Start the app locally with npm start and open http://localhost:7995.
